entries.command: "C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const fs=require('fs');const rules=fs.readFileSync('C:/Users/chulg/Documents/memory-keeper-plugin/scripts/inject-rules.js','utf8');const hasL1=rules.includes('L1 (Direct Execution)');const hasL2=rules.includes('L2 (Indirect Execution)');const hasL3=rules.includes('L3 (Structural Check)');const hasL4=rules.includes('L4 (Claim Without Evidence)');const all=hasL1&&hasL2&&hasL3&&hasL4;console.log(all?'PASS:all_levels_found':'FAIL:L1='+hasL1+' L2='+hasL2+' L3='+hasL3+' L4='+hasL4)"

entries.command: "C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=fs.readFileSync('C:/Users/chulg/Documents/memory-keeper-plugin/prompts/behavior-verifier-prompt.md','utf8');const subClauseHits=(p.match(/\*\*Direction change\*\*|\*\*Session-length deferral\*\*|\*\*Trailing deferral\*\*/g)||[]).length;const s=fs.readFileSync('C:/Users/chulg/Documents/memory-keeper-plugin/scripts/sycophancy-guard.js','utf8');const exit2Hits=(s.match(/process\.exit\(2\)/g)||[]).length;const ok=subClauseHits===3&&exit2Hits===1;console.log(ok?'PASS:cycle1-absorption':'FAIL:subClauseHits='+subClauseHits+' exit2Hits='+exit2Hits)"
